Use this as the base for the next iteration

- Fonts are good

Changes:

- Make “May 13-17, 2026” more visible

1. About  
2. Teachers  
3. Schedule  
4. Battle

Change tag line “A NewStyle Hustle Experience” →  “5-Day NewStyle Hustle Festival”

Currently need to scroll down slightly to see it

- Prefer count down number font on live page

![][image3]

Under “Get Your Pass” mention registration closing date; something like (but not exactly):

### About

![][image4]

- Replace this entire section with a short paragraph that describes “What is To the Music, why are we doing it, how is it different from other events, etc.” – stuff from the interview I did with Jas  
  - In future years, this section can serve more as a ’history of the festival’ vibe

About Text

| Mention core organizing and support team: Reina and Omari Advisory Support: Jeff, Melina, Kenji, Rob |
| :---- |

- My preferred headshot in shared folder; small  
- Instead of “Five Days of Dance” can say “About To The Music”  
  - No need for tag line underneath

- I almost missed this section on “The Parties” because I needed to scroll down a little. If I click on the next header, it skips this section. This can be removed since it is going to be described more in the schedule / explanation about the festival

![][image5]

### Teachers

![][image6]

- Headshots [**here**](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ILGAzbZLYGe-TwyYngT56kd5EDzxd-e9?usp=sharing)  
- Have bios appear as dropdowns under the dates

**Shortened bios**

1\. Miss Bibi

All-style dancer with 35+ years across 16 styles, Miss Bibi was part of the very first NewStyle Hustle classes in NYC and helped bring the movement to Europe. She teaches from a place of joy, connection, and deep musical feeling, where dance is therapy for the soul.

2\. Kenji

NYC-trained under the founders, Jeff & Robyn, Kenji is teacher, leader, community builder bridging NYC and Tokyo. His teaching focuses on musicality and syncopation to elevate both freestyle and partner connection in NewStyle Hustle.

3\. Melina

Global teacher, competitor, and community builder, Melina is known for redefining roles and embracing both lead and follow. She teaches creativity, role-switching, and freedom of expression through connection and play.

4\. Jeff Selby

Founder of NewStyle Hustle, Jeff Selby shaped a global dance movement rooted in musicality, connection, and freestyle expression. His artistic contributions continue to influence the global Hustle scene directly and indirectly around the world.

### Schedule

### ![][image7]

- Remove tag line “Five packed days…”  
- Remove day “Descriptors” in the bubbles (i.e., Arrive, Community, Train, etc.), and under the dates (i.e., “Community Day” under Thursday, May 14\)  
- Change the labeling so that it is not mutually exclusive – all the filters should be on the same level, meaning  
  - Clicking on date means you see everything for that date  
  - Clicking on Event type (All Events, Workshops, Parties, etc.) will show all events related to that category  
    - Reference most recent schedule for updated locations, match names, etc.  
  - Visualization would probably need to change though…  
  - Open to ideas on how this should look

Drop-in **Pricing** Changes:

- Soul Records Laboratory → Free  
- Picnic \+ Outdoor Session → BYOB or $10  
- Friday Workshop → 90 minute \= $35, 2 hour \= $40

Do we want to list the price of the Dancer’s Lists?

- Party after Q\&A → Included with ticket to Q\&A, $20 at door for party only  
- House of Vibes → $15  
- LoveCity → $10

### Battle

**NEW SECTION**

- Still need to talk to Kenji about the NewStyle HNT format (if we are going to change anything or keep rules completely the same, but with 2 NSH judges instead of balanced)  
- This page will be updated later, closer to event  
  - Specific Rules  
  - Judges

For now, things I want to include:

- Battle prelim 8:00 PM  
- All competitors must take at least 1 festival workshop to qualify for battle entry  
- Opening party with Waterparkjones from NSH San Diego; [headshot](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1o6atAJUcNQiWNp_PAwKVNi8vnMV8uiiS/view?usp=drive_link) and bio below  
  - Playing from 6:45 \- 8:00 PM  
- Link to @hustlentusslenyc IG account  
- Some general HNT prelim and battle rules (can pull from IG) – I’m sure there will be a prelim

Chris Bio:

Waterparkjones is an open format DJ hailing from San Diego, California. With a passion for diverse genres, WPJ started his musical journey back in 2004, spinning hip hop and breaks. In 2016, he discovered his love for soulful, deep, and afro house music, showcasing his skills on CDJs. WPJ’s background as a dancer influences his track selection, ensuring the dancefloor stays in motion.  
He is a resident DJ at Souleil, a renowned soulful house day party, and a co-creator of the dancer-focused iLL Function parties in San Diego. Sharing stages with notable artists, including King Britt, Mr. V, and Coflo, Waterparkjones embodies the spirit of a bboy, lofter, houser, rocker, and hustler.  
Experience his dynamic sets at San Diego house music shows, dance cyphers, and hustle socials.

### Tickets

![][image8]

|  | Workshop Pass | Workshop Pass+ | All Access Pass |
| :---- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
|  | 6 Workshops | 6 Workshops 1 Follower Styling | All 7 workshops HNT Jeff Q\&A \+ Party |
| **Raw Cost** | $230 | $270 | $315 |
| **% Savings** | 15% | 20% | 25% |
| **Price of Package** | $196 | $216 | $236 |
| **$ Savings** | $35 | $54 | $79 |

Best value is the All Access Pass

**Things you still need to pay for outside of the passes**

- Dancers list at the following parties:  
  - House of Vibes $15 USD Cash  
  - LoveCity $10 USD Cash  
  - Picnic (Bring a snack or drink contribution, or $10 cash)

Instead of “Get Tickets” as the button in each column, would prefer to say “Buy this Pass” 

- I also wonder if in Ticket Tailor it would be annoying to have specific links for each of the passes…maybe we should just have one button that says **“Purchase a pass or register for individual events in Ticket Tailor”**

### Merch

**Remove section completely**  
Will promote merch on IG instead \- very limited run of sizes that will be available for sale

Concept \- session where we are all wearing the shirts  
Dazil will shoot photos

### Plan → Change to “Locations”

![][image10]

Map is super cool and probably the most important part of the “Plan” section  
Make this its own new header and add new locations like Superfine \+ other party locations as they come up

Update tag line to be location-specific. “Everything you need to know…” not an accurate descriptor anymore

### FAQs

**NEW SECTION \- pulled from previous “Plan” section**

FAQ List

* What dance styles are featured at this festival?  
  * 

* Do I have to buy a package, or can I register for individual events?  
  * 

* Can I sign up when I get there?  
  * 

* Do any of the events have a maximum capacity?  
  * 

* What should I wear?  
  * 

* Why does the All Access Pass not include access to some parties?  
  * 

* How do I get on the Dancer’s List for parties?  
  * 

* I need help with housing. Who should I talk to?  
  * 

* What is the refund policy?  
  * 

### Contact

![][image11]

Clicking on “Contact” in the header is actually pinned to “Get in Touch” so “Follow Along” is kind of hidden at the moment. I think that the IG feed can fall under contact though.

For contact, instruction should be:

- DM us @tothemusicnyc \[and then it makes a lot of sense that IG carousel is in the same section\]

![][image12]

- Remove logo, and tag line (redundant)  
- Footer should mirror the new header labels and order  
- Remove random 3 circles that all just bring you back up to top of page (lol, why AI?)
